name: ASRock Z790 Pro RS/D4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - Support DDR4-5333+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - eDP 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock Z790 Pro RS/D4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: ASRock Z790 Pro RS/D4 ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 socket with DDR4 support, PCIe 5.0, and multiple M.2 slots.
